<!-- The component, variant, or API you have in mind. -->

<!-- Other approaches, and why they fall short. -->

**Fit**
<!-- Sumi is intentionally narrow and light-only. A note on how this fits the

<!-- Yes / No / With guidance — no obligation either way. -->
